overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City during a heavy rainstorm at night. The character moves from a covered underpass beneath an elevated highway, crosses a multi-lane street with futuristic vehicles, and enters another covered walkway illuminated by large digital billboards and neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass following a woman in white pants

notable_agents.action: woman in white pants walking ahead of ego at a steady pace

entered.detail: massive angled concrete support pillars for the elevated highway
large illuminated advertising screens displaying various colorful ads
concrete pedestrian walkway protected by the overpass above
long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the overpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Digital billboards illuminate the left side while the path ahead is dimly lit by overhead lights. A woman in white pants walks ahead, leading the way through the sheltered corridor.

events.description: ego passes the woman in white pants and continues forward toward the intersection
approaching the open intersection, traffic light and crosswalk become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: passing other pedestrians and approaching the crosswalk at the intersection exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the road barrier waiting to cross

entered.detail: tall traffic signal showing red light at the intersection ahead
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
metal railing separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The character continues under the overpass toward the exit, passing the woman in white pants. The environment brightens as the open intersection approaches, revealing a traffic light and crosswalk markings ahead. A pedestrian waits by the road barrier on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection crosswalk during heavy rain

events.description: exits the covered overpass and enters the open intersection with heavy rain falling
futuristic white car drives past from left to right through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street in heavy rain, navigating between vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic white car driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying a red advertisement with a face and text
sleek white futuristic vehicles parked and moving along the street
tall modern building with illuminated glass facade reflecting the rain
tall street lights casting bright beams through the rain

segments.scene_description: The character steps out from under the overpass into the open intersection, immediately exposed to heavy rain. The scene opens up to reveal towering glass buildings, futuristic cars driving through the wet streets, and massive digital billboards illuminating the area. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital displays

events.description: enters the covered walkway on the far side of the intersection, escaping the rain

agents.ego_description: entering the covered walkway and continuing forward past other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: concrete ceiling providing shelter from the rain with integrated lighting
glass doorway entrance to a building with illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the far side of the intersection and enters another covered walkway, escaping the heavy rain. The large red digital billboard is now prominent on the left at close range. The character continues walking through the sheltered corridor as other pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete underpass, across a rain-drenched city intersection, and into another neon-lit covered walkway. It begins within a dimly lit pedestrian corridor beneath a massive overpass, following a woman in white pants toward a brightening exit. As the camera passes her and reaches the road barrier, the scene opens abruptly into a heavy rainstorm, exposing towering glass buildings and futuristic cars navigating wet streets. The camera then tracks across a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst the downpour before turning toward the far side of the intersection. Finally, the environment shifts back to a sheltered space as the character enters a second walkway, where a massive red digital billboard looms close by and other pedestrians pass in the opposite direction.
